aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet. That's not a yes. That's not a no. That's a maybe at 4:45 PM on a Wednesday.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Historically, quiet is when things sneak past code review. 🔮

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Silence from the universe means silence from your pipeline too. Not a good sign.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. Your Slack notifications have not received the memo.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Yes — Nothing's happening anyway, which means nothing can go wrong. Bold logic.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will fill the silence by opening 14 new browser tabs.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet but your DevOps team is suspiciously also quiet.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Take this as a sign to finally close those 47 unread PRs. You won't.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: No — The stars aren't watching, but your on-call rotation is.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Even the stars did not show up to your standup today.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — Low energy day means low traffic. Sneak it in.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will spend this time finding a single misplaced comma. You will find it.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You've weighed the pros and cons for 3 hours. The PR is still open.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. The decision of which framework to use remains, as always, unresolved.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You don't know why. You just don't trust today. Trust the feeling.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. This is either very good or the calm before the Jira flood. Probably the Jira flood.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — You're deploying regardless. We both know this.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will interpret this as permission to refactor everything.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — The deadline is real but the deploy window is not.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. The deadline is not.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You wrote a custom deploy script for exactly this quiet day. It has never been tested.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will disrupt the silence with an unsolicited architecture proposal.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You're not entirely sure what you're deploying or why. That's a sign.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You have been staring at the same function for 40 minutes. The function has not changed.
